apps.name: Country Risk (interactive)
apps.description: Interactive in-conversation app shell for get_country_risk: renders the Composite Instability Index (CII 0-100), the unrest/conflict/security/news component breakdown, travel-advisory level, and sanctions exposure. Linked from the get_country_risk tool via _meta.ui.resourceUri; an MCP-Apps host renders it inline and streams the tool result in via postMessage. Static, data-free template — public and quota-exempt.
